title: How to have information on item card but not displayed on board
excerpt: I’d love to be able to have information in the item card that doesnt display on the board. We have lots of client information that needs to follow the item from board to board (moving from a leads board, to an active cli…

posts.author: amlt (Adrianne)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d love to be able to have information in the item card that doesnt display on the board. We have lots of client information that needs to follow the item from board to board (moving from a leads board, to an active client board, etc.; information like address, phone number, that sort of stuff) that we do not reference very often, and I am trying to avoid having all those columns clogging up our boards. Is there any way to keep things on the item card but not have them display in board columns?

posts.author: psperry (Accidental Selfie )
posts.cookedHtml: You can create a view with as many columns hidden as you like. Will that work for you?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @amlt

You can easily do that by hiding the column in your view by unchecking the column.

image865×259 23.8 KB

When opening the item card the column will still show.
